sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91191" key="ptilo/nwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτῐλόνωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91191.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with downy back</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κάμπη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.256</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphan.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
